evidence_label: case-001 T-BDMC catalog feasibility gate, not treatment advice

source_checks.result: Exact target remains CID 10447050, formula C19H16O3, InChIKey PALMCMYYFAHUGA-BPTNNVFMSA-N.
Name-adjacent stereoisomer CID 131752971 has the same formula but InChIKey PALMCMYYFAHUGA-ZRFKDBLFSA-N.
CAS 149732-52-5 and HY-N11902 resolve to target CID 10447050.
CHEMBL469419 matches target InChIKey and has no approved therapeutic status.
MCE lists HY-N11902, CAS 149732-52-5, purity 95.51%, and batch documentation links including COA, CNMR, RP-HPLC, and MS.
Namiki lists HY-N11902 from MedChemExpress, CAS 149732-52-5, formula C19H16O3, molecular weight 292.33, purity greater than 98%, and research-reagent-only language.
Focused T-BDMC/HbF/thalassemia search still returns Nuamsee 2021, PMID 33879818; synthesis source is PMID 24857542.

stereochemistry_trap.rule: Do not accept a name-only, formula-only, or CAS-only match when the intended assay seed is the target InChIKey.

purity_conflict_rule: MCE and Namiki display different purity values; treat batch-specific COA and HPLC documents as controlling before quote.
minimum_material_packet_before_quote: exact InChIKey or structure match to PubChem CID 10447050 or CHEMBL469419
qualified-lab confirmation that hemolysis, erythroid viability, and maturation safety-window readouts will be run
decision_rule: A catalog lead now exists, but T-BDMC remains held until exact batch identity, stereochemistry, purity, storage, vehicle, and safety-window assay acceptance are explicit.
